text:
Being here gives me a curious sense of anticipation. In the first image, the atmosphere of a conference or seminar settling in, people arranging themselves in a shared space of learning, makes me feel quietly observant—eager for ideas, yet somewhat detached amid formalities.

In the second image, standing close to someone engaged in a phone or audio conversation in an exhibit-like room, I'm struck by the intimacy of the moment contrasted with the impersonal digital displays. I feel reflective—the words on the screen beckon, suggesting an invitation to pause, question, and ponder the quiet layers beneath the buzz of activity.
